description: Use this API to read a power flow raw data file and add subsystem data specified in it to the working case. Allowed raw file formats are PSSE-15 through current format. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = readsubrawversion(numnam, vernum, ifile, status, usekv, basekv, sidarea, sidowner, sidzone)
python_syntax: ierr = readsubrawversion(numnam, vernum, ifile, status, usekv, basekv, sidarea, sidowner, sidzone)

parameters.name: numnam
parameters.description: Flag for bus number or name specification on records. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: vernum
parameters.description: Version number corresponding to the format of ifile. vernum is in the format of a psse release number. example: if ifile format is of psse-29.5.1: vernum = ‘29’ or = ‘29.5’ or = ‘29.5.1’. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Filename of the power flow raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: usekv
parameters.description: Subsystem base voltage flag. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: basekv
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the base voltage range. (input).

parameters.name: sidarea
parameters.description: Area subsystem identifier (0 through 11), or -1 to bypass subsystem specification by area. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: sidowner
parameters.description: Owner subsystem identifier (0 through 11), or -1 to bypass subsystem specification by owner. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: sidzone
parameters.description: Zone subsystem identifier (0 through 11), or -1 to bypass subsystem specification by zone. (input; -1 by default).

status.description: initialize working case before reading data.
append data to that already in the working case.
boundary bus identification flag (0 by default).
do not change type codes of boundary buses.
change type codes of boundary buses in preparation for the equivalencing calculation.
add only data from within subsystem.

usekv.description: do not use base voltage as a subsystem selection criterion.
use base voltage as a subsystem selection criterion.

error_codes.description: invalid SIDAREA value or area subsystem SIDAREA is not defined.
invalid SIDOWNER value or owner subsystem SIDOWNER is not defined.
invalid SIDZONE value or zone subsystem SIDZONE is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
